body_txt: A Reaction Shot where a character emits a clearly audible *Gulp!* Sometimes accompanied by a visibly-bobbing Adam's apple. Usually happens in an Oh, Crap! situation. This happens because fear releases stress hormones that stimulate the body and keep it alert. Cortisol, a panic hormone, has a "side effect" of drying your mouth when it's elevated. The gulp spreads any leftover saliva around and helps lubricate your dry throat and mouth. Very popular in animated works , graphic novels , and Comic Strips . Often follows someone being informed of Punishment Pending . Also see Spit Take and Saying Sound Effects Out Loud . Not to be confused with Gigantic Gulp , nor is it related to a character loudly gulping as a result of actually swallowing something. Contrast Ahem .
